name: lyra-tui-designer
description: Terminal UI (TUI) design best practice - design-led and framework-agnostic (ratatui, Textual, Bubble Tea, Ink, notcurses). Event-loop architecture, responsive layout, redraw discipline, input/focus, color/theming with NO_COLOR + capability fallback, affordances, async feedback, terminal accessibility, signal-safe terminal restoration, golden-frame testing, cross-environment delivery - 1 router + 13 sheets, 3 commands, 2 agents (tui-design-reviewer, tui-architect)
